items.creator: Helena Woods
items.title: Comment “ELEVATE” to learn how to create an electric buzz around your astrology work
items.summary:
Comment “ELEVATE” to learn how to create an electric buzz around your astrology work. 

The new wave of astrology is here. 

We’re innovating. 
We’re preserving the traditions of astrology while being a new exciting energy to the space. 

One that celebrates real community. Genuinely champions one another and innovates TOGETHER.

Think: conferences. Meet-ups. Physical creations. Retreats around the world (Costa rica! Scotland! Oops I said too much!!) 

This is the first spark. 

Be prepared for more ⚡️⚡️⚡️#newwaveastrology #newwaveastrologer 

Comment ELEVATE to join us this weekend for class 1 👇

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: Thema Mundi: How the Planets Came to Rule Two Zodiac Signs
items.summary:
This is an animation of an ancient Persian myth about how the traditional planets came to rule two signs of the zodiac in astrology. 

The narration and script with some embellishments on the original story are by Chris Brennan, and the animation was done by Jack Cusumano.

The original myth is preserved in Codices Vaticani 15, fol. 229, edited in CCAG 5, pt. 2 pp. 130-37 by I. Bidez, privately translated by Demetra George.
